title: [PUS] Define PUS TC packet structure and parser
body:
## Objective
Implement CCSDS/PUS-C telecommand packet parser.

## PUS TC packet structure (ECSS-E-ST-70-41C)
- Primary header: version, type, data field header flag, APID, sequence flags, packet length
- Data field header: CCSDS secondary header flag, PUS version, ack flags, service type, subservice type, source ID
- Application data: command parameters
- Packet error control: CRC-16

## Acceptance Criteria
- PusTcPacket dataclass covering all header fields
- PusTcParser.parse(bytes) -> PusTcPacket
- PusTcBuilder.build(apid, service, subservice, data) -> bytes
- CRC-16 validation
- Unit tests cover parse, build, invalid CRC

## Implements
SVF-DEV-037

title: [PUS] Define PUS TM packet structure and builder
body:
## Objective
Implement CCSDS/PUS-C telemetry packet builder.

## PUS TM packet structure
- Primary header: version, type, APID, sequence flags, packet length
- Data field header: PUS version, service type, subservice type, message counter, destination ID, time
- Application data: telemetry parameters
- Packet error control: CRC-16

## Acceptance Criteria
- PusTmPacket dataclass
- PusTmBuilder.build(apid, service, subservice, data) -> bytes
- CRC-16 generation
- Unit tests cover build and parse roundtrip

## Implements
SVF-DEV-037

title: [PUS] Implement PUS service catalogue (S3, S5, S17, S20)
body:
## Objective
Implement the most common PUS services used in spacecraft operations.

## Services
- Service 3 (Housekeeping): parameter report generation, HK report definition
- Service 5 (Event Reporting): normal/low/medium/high severity events
- Service 17 (Test): are-you-alive test, on-board connection test
- Service 20 (On-Board Parameter Management): parameter value set/get

## Acceptance Criteria
- PusService3, PusService5, PusService17, PusService20 classes
- Each service handles incoming TC and generates TM responses
- Unit tests cover each service nominal path

## Implements
SVF-DEV-037

title: [PUS] Implement OBC Equipment as PUS TC router
body:
## Objective
Implement a realistic OBC model that receives PUS TC packets, unmarshalls them, and routes commands to equipment via the appropriate bus interface.

## Design
- ObcEquipment extends Equipment
- Receives raw PUS TC bytes via TC input port
- Parses TC using PusTcParser
- Routes to correct bus based on APID and service mapping
- Generates PUS TM acknowledgement packets (S1)
- Aggregates HK telemetry via PUS S3

## Acceptance Criteria
- OBC receives PUS S20 TC and routes parameter set to 1553 RT
- OBC generates S1 acceptance/execution TM
- OBC responds to S17 are-you-alive TC
- Integration test: ground sends TC -> OBC -> 1553 -> RW

## Implements
SVF-DEV-037

title: [PUS] Implement TTC Equipment as ground-spacecraft interface
body:
## Objective
Implement a TTC (Telemetry Tracking and Command) equipment model that bridges the ground segment to the OBC via simulated RF link.

## Design
- TtcEquipment extends Equipment
- Accepts raw TC bytes from test procedure
- Forwards to OBC TC input port
- Receives TM packets from OBC and makes available to observables

## Acceptance Criteria
- TTC forwards TC to OBC correctly
- TTC exposes TM for observable assertions
- Integration test: inject PUS TC via TTC, observe TM response

## Implements
SVF-DEV-037

title: [PUS] Write end-to-end PUS TC/TM test procedures
body:
## Objective
Write test procedures demonstrating full ground-to-equipment command chain via PUS TC/TM.

## Test Cases
- TC-PUS-001: S17 are-you-alive TC, verify S17 TM response
- TC-PUS-002: S20 parameter set TC to RW torque, verify speed increases
- TC-PUS-003: S3 HK report request, verify TM contains correct parameters
- TC-PUS-004: Invalid TC (bad CRC), verify S1 rejection TM
- TC-PUS-005: Full chain: ground -> TTC -> OBC -> 1553 -> RW

## Acceptance Criteria
- All test procedures use svf_session fixture
- Campaign YAML committed: campaigns/pus_validation.yaml
- All tests pass

## Implements
SVF-DEV-037
